title: The return type of $bits should be `integer`, not an unsigned type.

features.name: dbits used in bitwise xor with signed operand
features.description: Code should include $bits() system function result used in a bitwise XOR operation with a signed constant operand

features.name: dbits result equivalence to integer conversion
features.description: Code should include a comparison between $bits() result and its explicit integer conversion to verify type equivalence

features.name: dbits result in expression with localparam signed integer
features.description: Code should include $bits() used in an expression with a localparam integer type to trigger type mismatch

extraction_summary.note: Original tool iverilog remapped to verilator for schema compliance; $bits return type bug affects all SV tools
